# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.2
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=${ELASTIC_PASSWORD:-changeme}
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ELASTIC_USERNAME=elastic # This username is used by other services to connect
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.13.2
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=kibana_system # Default user for Kibana to connect to ES
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-changeme} # Use the auto-generated password or set a custom one
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.13.2
    container_name: logstash
    ports:
      - "5044:5044" # Beats input
      - "9600:9600" # Monitoring API
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms256m -Xmx256m
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME=logstash_system # Default user for Logstash to connect to ES
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD=${LOGSTASH_PASSWORD:-changeme} # Use the auto-generated password or set a custom one
    networks:
      - elk-network
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:8.13.2
    container_name: apm-server
    cap_add: ["CHOWN", "DAC_OVERRIDE", "SETGID", "SETUID"] # Required by APM Server for some operations
    ports:
      - "8200:8200" # APM Server listening port
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - KIBANA_HOSTS=http://kibana:5601
      - APM_SERVER_USERNAME=apm_system # Default user for APM Server to connect to ES
      - APM_SERVER_PASSWORD=${APM_SERVER_PASSWORD:-changeme} # Use the auto-generated password or set a custom one
      - APM_SERVER_KIBANA_USERNAME=kibana_system # APM Server connects to Kibana to set up assets
      - APM_SERVER_KIBANA_PASSWORD=${KIBANA_PASSWORD:-changeme}
    networks:
      - elk-network
    volumes:
      - ./apm-server/apm-server.yml:/usr/share/apm-server/apm-server.yml:ro
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
      - kibana

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  elasticsearch-data:
    driver: local
